hero.subtitle: NAEOS is a declarative engineering platform that transforms specifications into high-quality software systems through a consistent, validated, and extensible pipeline.
features.title: Why NAEOS?
features.subtitle: A complete engineering runtime for specification-driven development
features.pipeline.desc: Parse, normalize, resolve, validate, and generate — an end-to-end pipeline that turns specs into production code.
features.spec.desc: Variable interpolation, cross-references, file includes, custom functions, conditional sections, and schema versioning.
features.multilang.desc: Generate code in Go, TypeScript, Python, Java, and Rust — with framework-specific adapters for each ecosystem.
features.ai.desc: Compile NEIR models into AI instruction sets for Copilot, Claude, Cursor, Gemini, Codex, and OpenCode.
features.marketplace.desc: Publish and discover industry profiles, plugins, and templates — with 5 built-in profiles ready to use.
features.governance.desc: Policy evaluation, artifact review, audit trails, and security analysis built into every pipeline run.
pipeline.title: How It Works
pipeline.subtitle: From specification to artifacts — the NAEOS pipeline orchestration

quickstart.subtitle: Get started with NAEOS in minutes
quickstart.desc: Describe your system once. Build anywhere.
